data.title: Carbios announces fiscal-year 2025 financial results
data.description: In Clermont-Ferrand, France, on April 17, 2026, at 7:45 am CEST, Carbios (Euronext Growth Paris: ALCRB) released its operational and financial outcomes for fiscal-year 2025. The financial data for December 31, 2025, were ratified by the Company's Board of Directors during their session on April 16, 2026.

data.title: Azenta (AZTA) Stock Drops 13% After-Hours — What's Happening?
data.description: Azenta Inc (NASDAQ: AZTA) stock is showing a downturn in after-hours trading due to the submission of a Form 3 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Azenta Life Sciences, a company specializing in life sciences tools to expedite the market entry of therapies and innovations, disclosed the form. Dated April 16, 2026, the filing reveals that William E. Martin III, President of Multiomics at Azenta, submitted an initial beneficial ownership statement under Section 16(a) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934. The document specifies that no securities are currently beneficially owned. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Gaxos (GXAI) Stock Surges Over 19% After Hours: Why Is It Moving?
data.description: Shares of Gaxos.ai Inc. (NASDAQ: GXAI) surged by 19.35% to $1.48 in post-market trading on Thursday following the company's announcement of expanding its Gaxos Labs platform with new AI tools including AI Music Generation, AI Chat, and AI 3D Model Creation. This move is part of Gaxos' strategy to enhance user engagement, diversify its generative AI offerings, and fortify its overall AI growth strategy. The expansion was revealed after the market closed on Thursday, with Gaxos aiming to strengthen its platform through image, video, music, and text-based AI tools tailored for various user segments like consumers, creators, and commercial users. The company reported a notable increase in user engagement across its AI portfolio post-expansion, attributing the rise to the new features. CEO Vadim Mats highlighted that these additions significantly broaden the platform's capabilities, meeting the rising demand for generative AI tools. data.title: 100 North Korean workers exposed in crypto by Ethereum Foundation program; 53 projects identified with DPRK hires.
data.description: The Ketman Project, which received funding from an Ethereum Foundation stipend, has uncovered 100 IT workers from North Korea. Additionally, they have reported around 53 projects that are utilizing employees from North Korea.

data.title: Wereldhave Trading update Q1 2026
data.description: In the latest quarterly report, the direct result per share (DRPS) increased by 2% to €0.45 compared to the same period last year. The occupancy rate of shopping centers also saw a rise to 97.5%, up by 1.0 percentage point from Q1 2025. Additionally, footfall at Full Service Centers increased by 2.0% compared to the previous year. Overall, the company generated revenue of €12 million during this quarter. For more detailed information, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Around 12 crypto organizations targeted following Drift Protocol hack; Rhea Finance & Grinex exchange suffer losses of $21M in 48 hours.
data.description: In the recent events, Rhea Finance and the Grinex exchange, which has connections to Russia, fell victim to hacking incidents, resulting in a staggering total of $21 million in losses over a span of just two days.
